retrieved_result: What was the name of the ""famous"" Jimi Hendrix Vietnam song?" "Maruti Sridhar, Never without my i Pod Answered Aug 19, 2015 · Author has 647 answers and 819.3k answer views Machine Gun Here're the lyrics to the live version from the second show at Berkeley: ""Happy new year first of all. I hope we'll have A million or two million more of them... if we Can get"
